### 🔲 J. MULTI-INTERFACE MODES

| Mode | Function | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Terminal | Text-only ritual scripting | Markdown, command-line OS mode |
| GUI Grid | Modular synth visual grid | Click + drag meaning |
| Audio Loop | Generative ambience + ritual tones | Sonic glyph response |
| Mirror Mode | Daily symbolic feedback system | Emotional check-in |
| Game Rooms | Procedural RPG paths, symbolic dungeons | Choose-your-own-myth structure |

* * *

🧭 CONCLUSION OF MEMORY CRAWL
